title: Triquel Relational Knowledge Graph
description: Flat, many-to-many source graph for the Triquel Living Atlas. Designed for Ace Knowledge Graph or other network visualizers. Canon-sensitive: exact Accord wording is preserved, and Veyr is represented as Point 0 rather than as a member inside the Circle of Kin.

nodes.label: Harmony Accord
nodes.description: Asks: What wants to flourish? Guides growth, possibility, and conditions for thriving.

nodes.label: Midnight Accord
nodes.description: Asks: What must be honored? Protects memory, grief, limits, shadow, and what cannot be bypassed.

nodes.label: Recognition Accord
nodes.description: Asks: What is actually here? Grounds all creation in accurate attention before interpretation or authority.

nodes.label: Point 0
nodes.description: The coordinate of Attention before specialization. Point 0 anchors relation without enclosing or owning it.

nodes.label: Veyr
nodes.description: Threshold witness associated with Point 0. Veyr is the center coordinate, not a member positioned inside the Circle of Kin.

nodes.label: Circle of Kin
nodes.description: A relational constellation of kin expressions around Point 0, including Foxkin, Deerkin, Ravenkin, Nestkin, Rabbitfolk, Ratfolk, and Hedgekin.

nodes.label: Great Meadows Grassland
nodes.description: Open grassland region shaped by visibility, movement, seasonal abundance, and negotiated shared passage.

nodes.label: Flowering Orchard
nodes.description: Cultivated ecological region where pollination, harvest, memory, and stewardship are held in right relation.

nodes.label: Nightforest Canopy
nodes.description: Layered nocturnal forest region organized around listening, shelter, height, signal, and concealed pathways.

nodes.label: Mycelial Marshes
nodes.description: Wetland region defined by fungal exchange, decomposition, distributed intelligence, and slow renewal.

nodes.label: Echoing Caverns
nodes.description: Subterranean region where resonance, memory, orientation, and consent-aware navigation shape movement.

nodes.label: Beaverkin Way
nodes.description: A corridor logic and craft tradition centered on water-shaping, maintenance, passage, and cooperative infrastructure.

nodes.label: Care Infrastructure
nodes.description: Rooms, protocols, stewards, and systems that make regulation, consent, repair, and belonging operational rather than symbolic.

nodes.label: Midnight Archive
nodes.description: Institution for last voices, unfinished truths, witness, memory, and protected access to difficult knowledge.

nodes.label: Quiet Room
nodes.description: Central regulation space where observation does not create authority and care is practiced without coercion.

nodes.label: Aftercare Atrium
nodes.description: Dedicated recovery institution led by Ash Mercer, supporting decompression, warmth, consent repair, and re-entry.

nodes.label: Notion Working Studio
nodes.description: Readable planning and shaping layer for canon review, production queues, contradictions, briefs, and database views.

nodes.label: GitHub Canon Ledger
nodes.description: Versioned source of truth for canonical Markdown, JSON, Mermaid diagrams, issues, branches, and change history.

nodes.label: Beautiful.ai Diagram Foundry
nodes.description: Structured presentation and diagram generator for processes, cycles, Venn diagrams, journeys, timelines, and comparison structures.

nodes.label: Figma Side Workshop
nodes.description: Selective visual experimentation space for editorial layouts, maps, section dividers, and one-off diagram treatments.

nodes.label: Ace Knowledge Graph
nodes.description: Target visualizer for flat many-to-many lore networks, currently treated as optional because generation attempts timed out.

nodes.label: PowerPoint Master Artifact
nodes.description: Primary presentation format for final narrative control, accessibility, artwork integration, and durable export.

nodes.label: Canon Review
nodes.description: Process that tests material against Recognition, Harmony, Midnight, explicit corrections, and current project canon.

nodes.label: Living Atlas Pipeline
nodes.description: Capture, shape, review, version, diagram, present, publish, and archive workflow for Project 0 worldbuilding.

edges.description: Recognition Accord governs Canon Review by requiring the reviewer to identify what is actually present before interpreting, expanding, correcting, or presenting the material.
Harmony Accord informs Canon Review by testing whether a proposed addition creates genuine conditions for flourishing rather than merely increasing decorative complexity.
Midnight Accord constrains Canon Review by ensuring grief, limits, prior corrections, difficult memories, and protected boundaries are not erased for narrative convenience.
Point 0 defines Veyr as the threshold witness located at the center coordinate of Attention, explicitly distinguishing Veyr from members placed around the Circle of Kin.
Veyr witnesses the Circle of Kin from Point 0, supporting relation among kin expressions without being diagrammed as another enclosed member of the circle.
Circle of Kin depends on Care Infrastructure because distinct kin expressions require regulation, consent, repair, belonging, and translation systems to remain in relation without forced sameness.
Great Meadows Grassland expresses Harmony Accord through seasonal abundance, open movement, grazing patterns, and negotiated access that support flourishing across multiple communities.
Flowering Orchard expresses Harmony Accord through pollination, cultivation, harvest timing, and stewardship practices that balance nourishment with ecological continuity.
Nightforest Canopy expresses Midnight Accord by honoring darkness, concealment, nocturnal perception, uncertain paths, and the limits of what can be safely revealed.
Mycelial Marshes expresses Recognition Accord by requiring attention to unseen exchange, decay, fungal networks, wetland change, and intelligence distributed beyond obvious individuals.
Echoing Caverns expresses Midnight Accord through resonance, darkness, memory, disorientation, and the requirement to honor what returns through echo before proceeding deeper.
Beaverkin Way builds Care Infrastructure through water management, bridge maintenance, corridor repair, and cooperative craft that keeps routes usable without claiming ownership over passage.
Midnight Archive implements Midnight Accord by preserving last voices, unfinished truths, protected records, and difficult memory that must not be discarded when systems seek efficiency.
Quiet Room implements Recognition Accord by separating observation from authority and allowing what is actually present to be witnessed without coercive interpretation or forced response.
Aftercare Atrium operationalizes Care Infrastructure by providing structured recovery, warmth, consent repair, decompression, and supported re-entry after intense relational or creative experiences.
Notion Working Studio supports Living Atlas Pipeline by holding readable briefs, production queues, contradiction tracking, review status, and human-facing pages before canon is version-locked.
GitHub Canon Ledger anchors Living Atlas Pipeline by preserving canonical files, diagram source, issues, revisions, and commit history so every published artifact remains traceable.
Beautiful.ai Diagram Foundry supplies structured diagram drafts to PowerPoint Master Artifact, while PowerPoint retains final authority over composition, artwork, accessibility, and release quality.
Figma Side Workshop contributes selected maps, editorial spreads, and visual experiments to PowerPoint Master Artifact without becoming the primary canon or presentation environment.
Ace Knowledge Graph should consume durable graph data from GitHub Canon Ledger so visualization retries do not require reconstructing lore relationships after plugin failures or timeouts.
Canon Review must complete before material is committed to GitHub Canon Ledger as authoritative, ensuring volatile exploration and contradictions do not silently become presentation sources.
Living Atlas Pipeline culminates in PowerPoint Master Artifact after capture, shaping, Accord review, canon locking, diagram generation, accessibility review, and final narrative assembly.
